title: 🍽️ Staff Meals
description: Spend on team meals. Does not affect the restaurant's food cost or stock.
empty_desc: Tick the 🍽️ Staff box on the order lines that are for the team. They'll appear here with their cost, without touching food cost or stock.
search_placeholder: Search by product, supplier or date…
settings_desc: Turn this on if you buy food to feed your team. A 🍽️ checkbox appears on orders and a separate tab tracks the spend. It does not affect food cost or stock.
settings_admin_only: Only an administrator can change this option.
